bdm_location_priority: Focus corridor: St Kilda → Brighton → Sandringham → Moorabbin (Bayside inner-south corridor). Office based in Moorabbin.
ideal_customer: Homeowners and families across Melbourne, the Bayside suburbs, and the Mornington Peninsula looking for reliable, high-quality heating and cooling solutions. Includes homeowners upgrading from gas to electric heating, new home builders through builder partnerships, and existing homeowners seeking servicing, repairs, or new installations. Customers value quality workmanship, expert advice, and long-term after-sales support.
project_count: Over 51 years serving Melbourne and Mornington Peninsula families. Preferred provider for majority of Peninsula, Bayside, and inner-city builders.
pricing_structure: Obligation-free, no-cost quotes. Customers contact sales team for tailored pricing.
background: McKinnon Heating & Cooling is a privately owned Australian business established in 1973 with over 53 years of industry experience. Co-owned and operated by Craig Gambrell, Simon Wilding, and Scott Handley whose collective industry experience spans over 100 years. Preferred provider for Peninsula, Bayside, and inner-city builders. Maintains a 4.7/5 Google rating.
why_started: To offer the best in heating and cooling systems tailored to the unique needs of each household, providing premium solutions to Melbourne and Mornington Peninsula families built on dedication, expertise, and a commitment to customers' utmost comfort.
mission: To help Melbourne and Mornington Peninsula families achieve year-round comfort through over 51 years of expert heating and cooling solutions, quality workmanship, and unparalleled after-sales support.
